name: Rug Smell Agent
description: Flags suspicious token patterns as risk signals, including liquidity weirdness, creator dumps, holder concentration, and suspicious volume.
degenPitch: Not a crystal ball. A smoke alarm for cooked-looking tokens.
whatItDoes: Scores rug-risk signals from available public data.
Highlights liquidity, holder, creator, and volume warnings.
cursorPrompt: Build a Rug Smell Agent using DNA x402. Frame results as risk signals, not guarantees. Gate detailed risk reports behind receipt verification and include liquidity, creator, holder, and volume warnings.
suggestedPrompt: Build a Rug Smell Agent using DNA x402. Frame results as risk signals, not guarantees. Gate detailed risk reports behind receipt verification and include liquidity, creator, holder, and volume warnings.
